title: Construction Supervision and Monitoring
subheadline: Ensuring quality, safety, and compliance on the ground.
description: On-site supervision ensuring quality and safety.
fullDescription: Our construction supervision teams ensure that projects are built according to design specifications, adhering strictly to safety regulations and quality standards.
painPoints: Without rigorous on-site oversight, contractors may cut corners, leading to substandard work, safety hazards, and massive cost overruns. Clients need an independent eye to enforce quality.
approach: We deploy resident engineers and quality control experts to monitor daily progress. We enforce strict adherence to IFC drawings, manage contractor disputes, and ensure rigorous HSE compliance.

caseStudy.title: Jogmai Khola SHP
caseStudy.description: Small hydropower project utilizing the Jogmai Khola river for sustainable electricity generation. Features comprehensive bank monitoring and construction supervision ensuring quality and financial compliance.

testimonial.quote: Having CEC Nepal's engineers on site gave us total peace of mind. They managed the contractors firmly but fairly, ensuring top-tier quality.
testimonial.author: Nabin Poudel
testimonial.title: Director of Infrastructure
